introSection: High Hazel Mini Mine Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer L&T Systems currently located at Robin Hoods Wheelgate Park in Farnsfield, Nottinghamshire, England, UK.
fullText: High Hazel Mini Mine Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer L&T Systems currently located at Robin Hoods Wheelgate Park in Farnsfield, Nottinghamshire, England, UK.
